record.summary: The second package: the in-process hiqlite addon (cache/KV with TTL + raft-replicated counters, exposed to Encore.ts via napi-rs) moves from enrahitu's `addon/` to `@statecrafting/hiqlite-native`. A napi-rs crate wrapping upstream hiqlite 0.14, with prebuilt per-platform binaries shipped as optional dependencies, generated by `napi create-npm-dirs` (not committed). Apache-2.0, like the chassis it serves. Drops the `addon/` edge from enrahitu/002-in-process-hiqlite, which keeps `backend/hiq/`.
record.title: In-process hiqlite as a napi-rs native addon
